metadata.name: Manganese
metadata.title: Manganese Laser Cleaning Settings
metadata.description: Detailed machine settings, parameter relationships, diagnostic procedures, and troubleshooting guides for optimizing manganese laser cleaning operations.

author.name: Todd Dunning
author.title: MA
credentials: MA Optics and Photonics, UC Irvine, 2019

powerRange.description: Optimal average power for Manganese oxide removal without substrate damage

wavelength.description: Near-IR wavelength for optimal absorption in Manganese oxides

spotSize.description: Beam spot diameter for precise cleaning control

repetitionRate.description: Optimal repetition rate for continuous cleaning coverage

fluenceThreshold.description: Minimum fluence required for Manganese oxide removal

pulseWidth.description: Nanosecond pulse duration for efficient oxide layer ablation

passCount.description: Recommended number of passes for complete oxide removal

overlapRatio.description: Optimal beam overlap for uniform cleaning coverage
